handoff.reason: Dogfood populate-coderef --source-headers on coderef-core itself. Feature branch only, review and conditional commit.

execution_rules.phase_1: Single phase, no hard stop. Create branch, run --source-headers, review diff, commit if correct, push. Do NOT merge to main.

hard_constraints: Do NOT merge feature/source-headers-dogfood to main
Only commit if header output is semantically correct
If populate-coderef exits non-zero, halt and report — do not commit
